architectReview.evidence: Architecture: workspace-in-place (engine/package.json exports covering ., ./providers/*, ./action-runtime/*, ./*) + esbuild bundle boundary is sound; no engine source moved so engine relative imports and tests are untouched (Principle 6). Import seam proven by import-smoke; distribution boundary proven by bundle test (cloakbrowser/playwright-core external, dynamic workspace fallback preserved). Product: Phase-0 acceptance met — stdio handshake completes, tools/list returns zero tools, humanize spike emits the per-method matrix and proves the default engine-routed path humanizes; exit checks P0-a/b/c pass, P0-d documented as the Phase-2 queue contract. Code: server.mjs registry seam is minimal and exercised by tests; CallTool returns a grounded structured error (no fallback masking); no dead code/duplication; engine/package.json mirrored byte-for-byte into all four skill roots keeping validate green.
commands: leader architect review over G001 changeset (mcp/, engine/package.json + mirrors, root workspace wiring)

executorQa.evidence: Real stdio MCP server spawned and handshaked via SDK client; unknown-tool call returns structured isError (no raw throw). Real CloakBrowser (humanize:true forced) launched; per-method humanization matrix captured. Distribution bundle asserted to externalize cloakbrowser/playwright-core and preserve the dynamic workspace-fallback import. 374 engine unit + 5 e2e regression tests unchanged and green; validate + engine:validate green.

artifactRefs.description: Phase 0 API/package QA report: commands, exit checks, adversarial cases
per-input-method behavioral humanization matrix from a real CloakBrowser context
browser automation transcript of the humanized launch/click/type/scroll run
post-run screenshot of the humanized CloakBrowser page

contractCoverage.obligation: server starts over stdio, handshakes, lists tools (zero in Phase 0)
default engine-routed input is measurably humanized; per-method matrix emitted
mcp imports deep engine modules by package name; bundle externalizes native deps and preserves dynamic fallback
engine imported unchanged; engine + e2e tests pass without assertion edits

surfaceEvidence.invocation: StdioClientTransport spawn of node mcp/src/server.mjs + initialize/listTools/callTool
launchCloakBrowser({headless:true}); humanClick/humanType/humanScroll on a data: page with mousemove/keydown recorders
node --test import-smoke.test.mjs + bundle.test.mjs + npm test + npm run validate/engine:validate

adversarialCases.scenario: call a non-existent tool over stdio
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: structured isError result, never a raw exception

adversarialCases.scenario: raw page.keyboard.press on a humanize:true context
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: measurably NOT humanized, justifying engine-routed default + boundary refusal

adversarialCases.scenario: detect cloakbrowser source inlined into the bundle
add engine/package.json to the canonical skill without mirroring; run npm run validate
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: validate fails closed on mirror drift until all 4 skill roots match, then passes

iteration.evidence: Leader ai-slop-cleaner sweep on the G001 changeset found no blocking findings (registry seam exercised; grounded structured error; real assertions; no dead code/duplication). Pre-existing lint errors in scripts/jsdoc-inventory.mjs and scripts/audit-jsdoc.mjs are baseline debt outside this changeset and outside the mcp lint scope. Full verification rerun clean after the cleanup review.
